summary: Frontend-only deep interaction testing completed for DailyCart. Tested 13 complex user flows across Customer, Vendor, and Admin portals. Successfully verified: complete checkout (single & multi-store), location change, vendor order management, admin KYC approval, and vendor activation controls. Backend already verified at 91.4% in iteration 1.

ui_bugs.issue: Time slot chips are disabled and cannot be clicked even when slots are available
ui_bugs.reproduction: Navigate to service vendor → click service → select tomorrow → time slots show but are disabled

integration_issues.issue: Advance button disappears after 2 status changes (accepted→picking), expected 5 changes to delivered
integration_issues.impact: Vendor cannot complete full order fulfillment flow in one session

integration_issues.issue: Dispute flow interrupted - unable to verify dispute badge appears after submission

passed_tests: Customer email/password login (customer@dailycart.in)
Home page loads with store cards
Navigate to store detail page
Add multiple products to cart
Cart drawer opens and displays items
Multi-store cart grouping (2 stores)
Complete checkout flow with address input
Order placed confirmation with order cards
Multi-store split creates 2 separate orders
Navigate to orders list page
Location picker opens and displays cities
Location change (Hyderabad → Pune) updates store list
Vendor mart login (vendor.mart@dailycart.in)
Vendor orders queue displays placed orders
Vendor order status advancement (placed→accepted→picking)
Admin login (admin@dailycart.in)
Admin KYC queue displays pending applications
Admin KYC approval moves vendor to approved tab
Admin vendors list displays all vendors
Admin vendor deactivate/activate toggle works
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix service booking time slot selection (slots are disabled). Investigate vendor order advancement button disappearing after 2 status changes. Test customer review and dispute flows manually to verify they work end-to-end. Consider adding vendor onboarding registration form validation.

success_percentage.critical_flows_working: Checkout (single & multi-store), Location change, Admin KYC, Vendor orders (partial)

flow_1_customer_checkout.steps_completed: Login → Home → Store detail → Add 2 products → Cart drawer → Checkout → Address → Place order → Confirmation → Orders list
flow_1_customer_checkout.notes: Full flow working perfectly. Order placed confirmation shows correctly with order cards.

flow_2_multi_store_split.steps_completed: Add product from store 1 → Home → Add product from store 2 → Cart shows 2 groups → Checkout → 2 order cards created
flow_2_multi_store_split.notes: Multi-store cart grouping and split checkout working as expected.

flow_3_service_booking.steps_completed: Home → Service vendor card → Booking page → Date selection (tomorrow) → Time slots load
flow_3_service_booking.failure_point: Time slot chips are disabled and cannot be clicked
flow_3_service_booking.notes: 9 time slots displayed but all are disabled. Possible causes: slots already booked, time validation issue, or disabled state bug.

flow_4_vendor_order_fulfillment.steps_completed: Vendor login → Orders queue → Placed filter → Advance status 2 times (placed→accepted→picking)
flow_4_vendor_order_fulfillment.failure_point: Advance button not found after 2 status changes
flow_4_vendor_order_fulfillment.notes: Expected 5 status changes to delivered. Button disappears after picking status. May need page reload or different filter.

flow_5_vendor_job_fulfillment.failure_point: Login conflict - page already logged in as mart vendor
flow_5_vendor_job_fulfillment.notes: Need to logout first or use separate session. Service vendor login at /vendor/auth failed due to existing session.

flow_6_customer_review.steps_completed: Customer login → Orders page → Found delivered order
flow_6_customer_review.failure_point: Flow interrupted before review dialog could be tested
flow_6_customer_review.notes: Delivered order exists but review flow not fully tested.

flow_7_customer_dispute.notes: Dispute button exists in code but flow not completed in testing.

flow_8_vendor_inventory_crud.failure_point: Login conflict - email input not found
flow_8_vendor_inventory_crud.notes: Page already logged in from previous test. Need fresh session.

flow_9_vendor_onboarding.failure_point: Registration form name field not found (input[name='name'])
flow_9_vendor_onboarding.notes: Registration form structure may be different than expected. Email and password fields exist but name field selector failed.

flow_10_admin_kyc_approve.steps_completed: Admin login → KYC queue → Pending tab → Approve button → Approved tab shows 26 vendors
flow_10_admin_kyc_approve.notes: KYC approval flow working perfectly. Vendor moved from pending to approved.

flow_11_admin_vendor_toggle.steps_completed: Vendors admin → Toggle deactivate → Toggle activate
flow_11_admin_vendor_toggle.notes: Vendor activation toggle working correctly. Status changes reflected immediately.

flow_12_admin_dispute_resolve.notes: Dispute resolution UI exists but no disputes to test with. Customer dispute creation flow was not completed earlier.

flow_13_location_change.steps_completed: Home (Hyderabad) → Location picker → Select Pune → Store list updates
flow_13_location_change.notes: Location change working perfectly. Stores changed from 'Sri Lakshmi Kirana, Green Valley Mart' to 'Apna Bazaar Kirana, Sri Venkateswara Stores'.

high_priority: Fix service booking time slot selection - slots are disabled
Investigate vendor order advancement button disappearing
Add proper logout flow between vendor sessions
medium_priority: Test customer review flow manually with delivered order
Test customer dispute creation and admin resolution end-to-end
Verify vendor inventory CRUD in clean session
Test vendor job fulfillment with service vendor account
low_priority: Improve vendor onboarding registration form field selectors
Add loading states for time slot availability
Consider adding order status polling for vendor queue
